world.name: World (全球底图)
world.description: Global basemap containing landmasses, country boundaries and oceans for zoom 0-5. Perfect offline canvas.

china_overview.name: China Overview (中国概况底图)
china_overview.description: Full country overview containing administrative lines, national expressways and major capital nodes for zoom 6-8.

liaoning.name: Liaoning Province (辽宁省概况底图)
liaoning.description: Province level package containing regional roads, primary transit lines, provincial borders, and county seats for zoom 9-11.

dandong.name: Dandong Region Detail (丹东全境详图)
dandong.description: Merged detailed vector-to-raster bundle covering Zhenxing, Yuanbao, Zhenan, Donggang, Fengcheng, and Kuandian at zoom 12-16 (optional 12-17).
